findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The title slide's lighthouse/coastal panoramic image is missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has a panoramic coastal image with a lighthouse at the top of the slide. The HTML version only shows the cityscape image and the NC logo, but the lighthouse/coastal panoramic image is absent.

findings.description: The NC logo with tree graphic is missing from slides 2-8 in the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF pages 2-8 each show an NC logo with tree in the bottom right corner as part of the slide template. These decorative logos are not present in the HTML.

findings.description: The Regulatory Impact Analysis on PDF page 7 is presented as a simple label-value list (not a table), but the HTML converts it into a formal table. While all data is present, the structure is changed. This is an acceptable semantic conversion, but the table lacks headers (th elements), which misrepresents the structure slightly.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a simple two-column label-value layout without borders. HTML renders it as <table> with <td> elements but no <th> header row.
